endpoints.description: Server-side wallet calls SurelyFactory.activatePool() to transition a pool from FUNDING to ACTIVE state. Accepts either a poolAddress directly or a txHash to extract it from PoolCreated event logs.

body.poolAddress: string? — pool contract address (use this or txHash)
body.txHash: string? — createPool() transaction hash (extract pool address from PoolCreated event)

400.description: Invalid or missing pool address, or PoolCreated event not found in tx

500.description: Server configuration error (missing PRIVATE_KEY) or transaction failure

endpoints.notes: Uses server PRIVATE_KEY env var. Factory address hardcoded to 0x327f771EE67BeD16C7d8C3646c996e09d0e7566e. Waits for 1 confirmation before returning.

endpoints.description: Verifies user eligibility for an insurance pool, generates a proofHash from user address + verificationType + verificationData, and stores the proof on-chain via EligibilityRegistry.storeProof()

body.verificationData: Record<string, string> — form fields (e.g. { fullName, dob, idNumber })

500.description: On-chain storage failed (falls through to return proofHash without txHash)

endpoints.notes: proofHash = keccak256(abi.encodePacked(userAddress, verificationTypeNum, JSON.stringify(verificationData))). If PRIVATE_KEY not set, returns proofHash without on-chain storage. EligibilityRegistry at 0x2AC06eA51ae0C56ff2d74441206E081EECAE83fF.

endpoints.description: AI insurance advisor powered by Claude Service. Answers questions about a specific pool using injected policy context.

body.context: string — policy parameters and agreement text injected as context

example.text: This policy covers BTC price drops below $40,000 for a 12-hour window...

endpoints.notes: Uses chatSync() from Claude Service (model: sonnet). Falls back to static message if Claude Service unavailable. Context is injected as system-level policy info.

endpoints.description: Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for purchasing CZUSD to fund a policy premium

body.amountUsd: number — USD amount to convert to CZUSD (1–10000)
body.userAddress: string — user wallet address (stored in metadata)

400.description: Missing amountUsd or userAddress, or amount out of range (1–10000)

endpoints.notes: Amount converted to cents via Math.round(amountUsd * 100). Metadata includes userAddress for webhook processing.

endpoints.description: Handles Stripe webhook events — mints CZUSD to user wallet on successful payment
endpoints.notes: Listens for payment_intent.succeeded events. On success, mints CZUSD to userAddress from event metadata. Verified via STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

endpoints.description: Proxies a test request to the mock server to validate that a data source is reachable and returning data during pool creation

body.source: string — source display name (e.g. 'CoinGecko API', 'OpenWeather API')

endpoints.notes: Proxies to MOCK_SERVER_URL (default: http://localhost:4000). Source-to-endpoint map: CoinGecko→/api/btc-price/coingecko, OpenWeather→/data/weather, FlightAware→/data/flight-status, etc.
